description: Create a CodeQL GitHub Actions workflow that analyzes code on push to the master branch, on pull requests to the master branch, and on a scheduled basis. Run an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions for actions, contents, and write permission for security events. Use a matrix strategy to analyze C++, Python, and Actions code by checking out the repository, initializing CodeQL tools, setting up prerequisites, attempting to autobuild compiled languages, and performing CodeQL analysis.
